basic_details.job_title: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Mobile App Developer post through the TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation can be given to exceptional candidates based on the recommendations by the committee.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or equivalent degree from a recognized university
qualification.details: B.E. / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or equivalent degree from a recognized university. Proven experience in designing and developing native or cross-platform mobile applications (Android/iOS). Strong hands-on experience with frameworks/tools like Flutter, React Native, or Android Studio. Experience integrating mobile front-ends with enterprise back-end APIs and RESTful web services. 01-year experience in a relevant field is desirable.

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.tata_memorial_centre_tmc: B.E. / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or equivalent degree from a recognized university

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Mobile App Developer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.E. / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or equivalent degree from a recognized university. Proven experience in designing and developing native or cross-platform mobile applications (Android/iOS). Strong hands-on experience with frameworks/tools like Flutter, React Native, or Android Studio. Experience integrating mobile front-ends with enterprise back-end APIs and RESTful web services. 01-year experience in a relevant field is desirable.

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation can be given to exceptional candidates based on the recommendations by the committee.

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC Mobile App Developer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the TMC Mobile App Developer post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Mobile App Developer post at Tata Memorial Centre is scheduled for 21st July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Mobile App Developer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E. / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or an equivalent degree from a recognized university to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Mobile App Developer post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the TMC Mobile App Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Mobile App Developer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 45,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) office in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience required for this post?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, 01 year of experience in a relevant field is desirable for the Mobile App Developer position.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for the Mobile App Developer role?
faq.answer: Proven experience in designing and developing native or cross-platform mobile applications (Android/iOS) and strong hands-on experience with frameworks like Flutter or React Native are preferred.
